title: Cobblemon Customizamons
description: Cobblemon Customizamons is a mod that adds various customization forms to various cobblemon.
body:
THIS MOD IS FOR COBBLEMON 1.6, AND WILL LIKELY NOT BE UPDATED TO 1.7

Cobblemon Customizamons adds various unique forms for select pokemon for all your customization needs. This mod is currently a WIP, and we have some forms planned for the future.
The current forms include:
- **Voltorb** and **Electrode**, Right click with a modern pokeball to transform them (currently missing a few)
- **Hisuian Voltorb** and **Electrode**, Right click with a ancient pokeball (also missing a few)
- **Revavroom**, Right click with dye
- **Aegislash**, Evolve Doublade with any of the minecraft swords as a held item. **Doublade now requires a sword as a held item when it evolves**
